THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COURTNEY, ALBERT J. HILL-COURTNEY, ELINOR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GIANNINI, RONALD *** THE COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANT RETURNED THE MANTEL TO SFPD ON 5-15-08, AND THAT PLAITNIFFS HAVE NOT MET THEIR BRUDEN IN ESTABLISHING DEFEFDANT DAMAGED THE MANTEL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT GIANNINI, RONALD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT COURTNEY, ALBERT J. HILL-COURTNEY, ELINOR **** ALTHOUGH THE RENTAL AGREEMENT STATES PLAITNIFFS HAVE NO RIGHT TO STORAGE, THEY & OTHERS, STORED ITEMS IN THE BASEMENT WITH OUT OBJECTION OR CHARGE OF A STORAGE FEE. DEFENDANT HAS NOT ESTABLISHED THAT ANY AGREEMENT (WRITTEN OR ORAL) EXISTED AUTHORIZING THE COLLECTION OF ANY STORAGE FEE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
